# Thryv — Accounting Firm in South Africa

> Thryv (Thryv Accountants Pty Ltd) is a chartered accounting firm in Cape Town & Stellenbosch, South Africa, providing fixed-fee accounting, bookkeeping, tax, payroll, audit and advisory services to small and medium businesses.

## Services
- Accounting Services (fixed monthly packages): /services/accounting-services/
- Bookkeeping: /services/bookkeeping-services/
- Tax Services (SARS compliance): /services/tax-services/
- Payroll: /services/payroll-services/
- Audit Services: /services/audit-services/
- Independent Review: /services/independent-review/
- Financial Statement Preparation: /services/financial-statement-preparation/
- Company Secretary: /services/company-secretary/
- Finance Consultancy: /services/finance-consultancy-services/
- Employer of Record: /services/employer-of-record/

## Pricing
- Bronze — R3,500/month (up to 50 transactions)
- Silver — R5,500/month (adds payroll, up to 100 transactions)
- Gold — R7,500/month (complete solution, up to 200 transactions)

## Key pages
- Home: /
- About: /about/
- Services: /services/
- Blog: /blog/
- Contact / Get a quote: /contact/

## Contact

- Offices: Cape Town & Stellenbosch, South Africa
